notes: C-corporation parity should track Form 1120 computation, MeF serialization, and backend entity-return handling.
S-corp parity should include ordinary business income, Schedule K/K-1 allocation, and shareholder ownership inputs.
Partnership parity should cover guaranteed payments, partner allocations, Schedule K/K-1, and liabilities.
Trust and estate parity is driven by fiduciary, beneficiary, distribution, and compressed-bracket logic.
Nonprofit parity is partially implemented in local forms, but Cloudflare still routes Form 990-family work to expert handling.
